browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Vegetation, Vegetation Indices, NDVI LTS 1km 10-daily V3
collectionDescription: Provides the Long-Term Statistics of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index. Every 10-days, minimum, median, maximum and mean are available at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~1km over the 21-years period 1999-2019. More information here.

layers.shortDescription: Maximum value of Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
layers.longDescription: Maximum value of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index calculated over the 21-years period 1999-2019.

layers.shortDescription: Mean value of Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
layers.longDescription: Mean value of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index calculated over the 21-years period 1999-2019.

layers.longDescription: Median value of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index calculated over the 21-years period 1999-2019.

layers.shortDescription: Minimum value of Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
layers.longDescription: Minimum value of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index calculated over the 21-years period 1999-2019.

layers.shortDescription: Standard deviation of Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
layers.longDescription: Standard deviation of the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index calculated over the 21-years period 1999-2019.

layers.shortDescription: Number of NDVI values used to calculate the statistics
layers.longDescription: Number of NDVI values used to calculate the statistics over the 21-years period 1999-2019.
